symptom_text: R3 never reaches the Full state with its neighbor, staying stuck at EXSTART or EXCHANGE.
hidden_root_cause: MTU mismatch between the two interfaces (e.g. R1 at 1500, R3 at 1400) — the single most common cause of hanging specifically at this stage.
expected_diagnostic_order: Run 'debug ip ospf adj' and look for 'has larger interface MTU' messages.
Compare MTU on both interfaces with 'show ip ospf interface <int> | include MTU'.
Fix by standardizing MTU on both interfaces, or temporarily apply 'ip ospf mtu-ignore'.
